project.name: roadtripper
project.description: Road trip planner using Urban Explorer database with persona-based recommendations

current_phase.last_session_work: Session 7: Recommendation refresh after stop add — SHIPPED + LIVE. Replaced recomputeRouteAction with recomputeAndRefreshAction(origin, destination, stops, budgetHours) returning a tighter discriminated union: {ok:true,status:'fresh',waypointFetch} | {ok:true,status:'degraded',waypointFetch:null} | {ok:false,error}. Serial waterfall: computeRouteWithStops → findCandidateCities(new polyline) → fetchWaypointsForCandidates. Single rate-limit charge per call (documented). CityContext extended with lat/lng so client can build CandidateMarker without re-querying UE cities (Council S7-ARCH-1). New liveWaypointFetch: WaypointFetchResult | null slice in PlanWorkspace mirroring S6's liveRoute pattern; effectiveWaypointFetch = liveWaypointFetch ?? props. Atomic batched setters after the final await per Council S7-ARCH-3/4. requestIdRef stale-bail wraps BOTH setters; empty-stops branch resets BOTH before incrementing requestIdRef. Partial-failure path: route succeeds + candidates fail returns status='degraded' and client KEEPS prior waypointFetch + surfaces inline 'Couldn't refresh recommendations — showing previous' notice (both Arch ARCH-2 and Product PROD-1 independently flagged this — the most critical council finding of S7). Stale-recs banner from S6 removed. Prominent 'Updating route + recs…' caption during isPending. refreshTick + 800ms panel highlight ring on each successful refresh (Council S7-PROD-2, positive proof of refresh). Shared isBudgetHoursInRange helper extracted into validation.ts (single source of truth). Council pre-EXECUTE: Sec 8/10, Arch 7.5/10 B, Prod 6/10 — all CONDITIONAL, 11 blockers addressed. Simplify post-EXECUTE: 4 fixes (biggest: tightened discriminated union so `fresh ⇒ waypointFetch !== null` is compile-time enforced). 50/50 ISC pass. Lint/type-check/build green. Committed e77a3b5 and pushed to origin/main. LIVE at rollout-2026-04-08-000 (Cloud Run revision roadtripper-build-2026-04-08-000). App Hosting GitHub connection wired mid-session via Firebase console — future pushes to main auto-deploy, was previously manual-rollout-only.
current_phase.next_action: Session 8: polish the MVP. Top candidates from S7 out-of-scope list and prior council deferrals (ranked by user-visible impact): (1) MARKER DIFF — PolylineRenderer Effect 2 currently tears down and rebuilds ~25 candidate markers on every refresh, visible flicker on every Add; fix with an id→marker map + diff. (2) OFF-CORRIDOR INDICATOR in Itinerary — mark stops that are no longer in the refreshed candidate list with a subtle badge (addresses a Council S7-PROD observation). (3) MOBILE BOTTOM SHEET — the 360px fixed aside doesn't fit phones; 20/55/92 snap points (Session 5 council deferred). (4) SAVE/LOAD TRIPS — biggest new surface; needs Firestore schema + Clerk-scoped storage + trip list view. (5) 'OPTIMIZE STOP ORDER' toggle — wraps Routes API optimizeWaypointOrder. Recommended: #1 first (direct polish to the live S7 interaction), #3 second (biggest footprint gap), then #4 as a larger net-new feature. Ask user which to take on.

foundation: Next.js 16 project init with TypeScript + Tailwind
Firebase/Firestore connection to urbanexplorer named database
Google Maps API setup with route display
core: Route calculation via Google Maps Directions API
Stop recommendation engine (query waypoints within +/- 60 min of route)
Dynamic route recalculation on stop selection
personas: Persona selector UI (outdoorsman, foodie, gearhead, culture, nerd)
Persona-to-vibe mapping (Urban Explorer vibeClass + waypoint categories)
Filtered recommendations based on active persona
Persona-themed route line colors and markers
polish: Marker diff (avoid full rebuild on every refresh)
Multi-day itinerary view with day dividers
Mobile bottom sheet for itinerary (20/55/92 snap points)

session_log.title: Stop recommendation engine
session_log.summary: Phase 1+2 of the recommendation pipeline: geometric pre-filter + Routes API computeRouteMatrix for drive-time validation. Added LRU cache, samplePolyline interpolation, projectOntoPolyline precision, scaled detour cap. Council pre-EXECUTE gate became a HARD gate mid-session (retroactive review → workflow change in skills/10-build.md).

session_log.title: Persona system + recommendation engine
session_log.summary: 5 personas with typeWeights/preferredVibes/accentColor. Isomorphic scoring engine runs client-side on persona change. Critical architectural lesson: in Next.js 16 force-dynamic pages, router.replace on a searchParam re-runs the Server Component and re-bills computeRoute. Fixed by lifting persona to client state + history.replaceState sync. Council pre-EXECUTE gate (22 ISC from findings). Committed ae3601f.

session_log.title: Stop selection + route recalc (MVP loop closer)
session_log.summary: recomputeRouteAction Server Action with 3-layer rate limit (burst/spacing/daily quota). computeRouteWithStops helper in directions.ts. Client trip state (TripStop[], 7-stop cap), liveRoute: DirectionsResult | null, requestIdRef latest-wins. Itinerary component. Council pre-EXECUTE: Sec 6/10, Arch 6/10, Prod 7/10 — all CONDITIONAL, 18 blockers addressed. Simplify caught polyline-rebuild-on-pending (now setOptions({strokeOpacity}) in place). Committed 1bc3270.

session_log.title: Recommendation refresh after stop add
session_log.summary: Replaced recomputeRouteAction with recomputeAndRefreshAction — serial route+candidates+waypoints waterfall, single rate-limit charge. CityContext extended with lat/lng. liveWaypointFetch slice, effectiveWaypointFetch derived. Degraded path keeps prior recs + inline notice (S7 council ARCH-2/PROD-1 — both reviewers independently flagged clobbering-on-degraded). Discriminated union tightened to 2-arm keyed on waypointStatus (compile-time invariant). Refresh-success highlight. Removed the S6 stale-recs banner. Council: Sec 8/10, Arch 7.5/10, Prod 6/10 — 11 blockers addressed. Committed e77a3b5. LIVE as rollout-2026-04-08-000. ALSO: discovered App Hosting GitHub connection was never wired — all prior deploys manual — user set it up mid-session via Firebase console; auto-deploy now works.

resume_instructions: Roadtripper is LIVE at https://roadtripper--roadtripper-planner.us-central1.hosted.app with Sessions 5 + 6 + 7 all deployed as of 2026-04-09. The MVP loop is closed end-to-end: enter origin/destination → see route + persona-ranked recommendations → Add city to trip → route reshapes + recommendations refresh + Itinerary tracks the trip. Key files to re-read on resume: src/app/plan/actions.ts (recomputeAndRefreshAction), src/app/plan/page.tsx (Server Component, force-dynamic), src/components/PlanWorkspace.tsx (liveRoute + liveWaypointFetch null-fallback pattern), src/components/RouteMap.tsx (PolylineRenderer 4-effect split with hasFitOnceRef), src/components/{RecommendationList,Itinerary,PersonaSelector}.tsx, src/lib/routing/{directions,candidates,recommend,scoring,validation,rate-limit,format,cache,polyline}.ts, src/lib/personas/{types,index}.ts. Key memories to load: project_roadtripper.md (current state + stack versions), reference_apphosting_deploy.md (deploy diagnostic chain + smoke test commands), and ALL feedback_*.md (six files encoding hard-learned architectural invariants + working style across S5-S7). Council pre-EXECUTE gate is MANDATORY per Session 4.5 workflow change — never start BUILD on Advanced effort without it. CONDITIONAL is the normal council verdict; remediation of every blocker is the actual ship signal, not the verdict itself. Next session should pick from the next_action list and ask the user which direction. Deploy pipeline: push to origin/main now auto-deploys via the wired App Hosting + GitHub connection (verify via gcloud run services list --region=us-central1 for the last-deployed timestamp if in doubt). Runtime smoke test commands are in reference_apphosting_deploy.md. Note: PRDs for prior sessions live in ~/.claude/MEMORY/WORK/{slug}/PRD.md (ephemeral working state); the durable distillation is the council review files in .harness/memory/decisions/ and the feedback memories.
session_log_format_note: Each session_log entry is an INDEX, not a rationale record. The 'why' lives in feedback_*.md memories and .harness/memory/decisions/ council files. Read those for design context before extending an area.
